SETTINGS.SotCMacroShorthandL: Enable shorthand macro syntax that allows referencing attributes directly, e.g. @str instead of @attributes.str.label. Disable this setting if you need to reference the full attribute model, e.g. @attributes.str.label.
SETTINGS.SotCChatKeywordsL: JSON list of custom keyword→icon mappings for chat enrichment.
SETTINGS.SotCChatKeywordsMenuHint: Add custom keywords (e.g. [On Use], Clash Win) with icons that appear inline in chat skill messages.
SETTINGS.SotCRestoreStaggerL: When combat ends, automatically restore all combatants' stagger to their maximum value.
SETTINGS.SotCRestoreLightL: When combat ends, automatically restore all combatants' light to their maximum value.
SETTINGS.SotCPlayerDamageWizardN: Players Can Apply Damage to Enemies
SETTINGS.SotCPlayerDamageWizardL: When enabled, players can open and resolve the Damage Wizard from their own skill rolls and apply damage directly to enemy tokens. The update is proxied through the GM socket so players never need ownership of the target. When disabled, only the GM can resolve the wizard.
SETTINGS.SotCEnemyEmotionPointsL: When enabled, enemy (non-player) actors also gain 1 Emotion Point when participating in a clash resolution, the same as player characters.
SETTINGS.SotCSinkingEnemyEmotionPointsN: Sinking Also Costs Enemies Emotion Points
SETTINGS.SotCSinkingEnemyEmotionPointsL: [Alternate Rule] By default, Sinking only reduces Emotion Points on player characters. When enabled, enemy actors also lose EP equal to half their Sinking count when the end-of-scene Sinking effect triggers.
SETTINGS.SotCSinkingPlayerEmotionPointsL: When enabled (default), Sinking reduces a player character's Emotion Points by half the Sinking count at scene end. Disable to remove the EP cost for players entirely.
SOTC.NotifyGroupAttrDuplicate: Attribute group already exists as a single attribute.
SOTC.NotifyGroupAlphanumeric: Attribute group names cannot contain spaces or periods.
SOTC.NotifyGroupReserved: Attribute group "{key}" is reserved and cannot be used.

SOTC.DeleteGroupContent: Do you want to delete this group? This will delete the following group and all associated attributes:
SOTC.StatusPassiveEffect: {effect} {target} by {flat} flat, and by {potency} per count.
SOTC.StatusPostActiveHelp: Create the following buttons for triggering the status' effect and changing the count after the effect is triggered.
SOTC.StatusMinResourceTitle: Don't reduce the target resource below this value (0 = no floor)
SOTC.StatusMinResourceSceneTitle: Don't reduce the target resource below this value at scene end (0 = no floor)
SOTC.StatusNullLightRegen: Prevent light restoration at scene start.
SOTC.StatusNullAffinities: Nullify any base damage and stagger resistances.
SOTC.StatusResetStagger: Recover all stagger on clearing status.
SOTC.DamageWizardCritThorns: doubles Thorns damage — target has {count} Thorns
SOTC.DamageWizardSuppressBleedHint: skip Bleed this attack — attacker has {count} Bleed

SOTC.NotifyDamageWizardGMOnly: The Damage Wizard is currently restricted to the GM.

SOTC.KeywordConfigHelp: These keywords will have their icon shown inline in chat skill mod lines. The match is case-insensitive and whole-word. No apply button — display only.
SOTC.StatusPrintStaggerLike: Stagger-like effects don't have description support yet.
SOTC.DamageClashWinOffensive: Clash Win — dealt {dmg} damage and {stagger} stagger to {target}
SOTC.DamageUnopposedOffensive: Unopposed — dealt {dmg} damage and {stagger} stagger to {target}
SOTC.DamageClashLoseBlock: Clash Lose vs Block — {defender}'s block dealt {stagger} stagger to {attacker} (no HP damage)
SOTC.DamageClashLoseEvade: Clash Lose vs Evade — {defender}'s evade recycled! No damage. They may re-deploy it.
SOTC.DamageClashLoseOffensive: Clash Lose vs Offensive — {attacker} takes {dmg} damage and {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageBlockWinOffensive: Block Clash Win vs Offensive — dealt {dmg} damage and {stagger} stagger to {target}
SOTC.DamageBlockWin: Block Clash Win — dealt {stagger} stagger to {target}
SOTC.DamageBlockLoseOffensive: Block Clash Lose vs Offensive — blocked {blocked}, {attacker} takes net {dmg} damage and {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageBlockLoseEvade: Block Clash Lose vs Evade — {defender}'s evade wins, they regain {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageBlockUnopposed: Block Unopposed — die saved for later this scene (power: {power})
SOTC.DamageEvadeWinOffensive: Evade Clash Win vs Offensive — die recycled! No other Clash Win effects trigger.
SOTC.DamageEvadeWinDefensive: Evade Clash Win vs Defensive — {evader} regains {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageEvadeLoseOffensive: Evade Clash Lose vs Offensive — evade absorbed {absorbed} stagger, {attacker} takes {dmg} HP and {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageEvadeLoseBlock: Evade Clash Lose vs Block — {evader} takes {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageEvadeLoseEvade: Evade Clash Lose vs Evade — {defender}'s evade wins, they regain {stagger} stagger
SOTC.DamageEvadeUnopposed: Evade Unopposed — die saved for later this scene (power: {power})
